description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls B. platform-api fronts the AI runtime: it calls ai-agent-svc, which persists agent state via ai-memory-svc (backed by DynamoDB table pipeline-states).

edges.note: persists/loads agent state; RETRIES on throttle

note: Request flow A->B. ai-memory-svc is the leaf (DynamoDB-backed). When DynamoDB throttles its writes, the failure propagates callee->caller: ai-memory-svc -> ai-agent-svc (which retries, amplifying its own metrics) -> platform-api.
